title: alyssum asperum
intro: Alyssum asperum, also known as Mouse Flower, is a small, annual or biennial plant in the family Brassicaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Alyssum asperum include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
